source: RR4W KML (processed): LineStrings greedy-chained by nearest endpoint, then longest run with edges capped at 700 m to drop telemetry spikes. Trails 37 and 38 use GPX field tracks from planning/ when present (hell_s_revenge_kmz.gpx, top-of-the-world-2024.gpx). Re-run import_rr4w_moab_kml.py after RR4W or GPX updates.

trail_meta.notes: Sand Flats fee area; bypass-heavy weekday flavor of Hell’s Revenge.
